content: The President of France is Emmanuel Macron. He has been serving since his election in 2017 and is currently in his second term.
raw_content: The President of France is Emmanuel Macron. He has been serving since his election in 2017 and is currently in his second term.
reasoning: Okay, so I need to figure out who the President of France is. I'm not super up-to-date on current events, but I remember hearing about Emmanuel Macron a few years ago. I think he was elected around 2017 or so. I'm pretty sure he's still in office because I don't recall any major news about a new president in France recently. Maybe I should double-check that, but I'm fairly confident it's Macron. I don't think there have been any elections since then that would have changed the president. So, yeah, I'm going to go with Emmanuel Macron as the current President of France.
